approach: Extend CANONICAL_SUBSTEPS to include analyze and clarify (empty substeps), add matching completed-status + done-phrase entries in promptBuilder.ts, and guard the substep-line rendering so buildPrompt emits a full context-update preamble for analyze and clarify — closing their lifecycles without touching .specify/ or .claude/.

T001.did: Added analyze: [] and clarify: [] to CANONICAL_SUBSTEPS, widening PromptStep to accept both steps.

T002.did: Added analyze/clarify entries to COMPLETED_STATUS_BY_STEP and DONE_PHRASE_BY_STEP; guarded the substep-line renderer to print 'none — single-pass step.' when the substep array is empty.

T003.did: Extended three test loops (preamble-wrap, char-budget, leave-currentStep) to cover analyze and clarify; added focused assertions for completed status, done phrase, and the empty-substep rendering line.

T004.did: Added Unreleased CHANGELOG entry describing the fix and linking #194.

specify.key_finding: CANONICAL_SUBSTEPS in src/core/types/specContext.ts omits analyze and clarify, so buildPrompt's isKnownStep guard drops the bookkeeping preamble for them — extension dispatches /speckit.analyze with raw command text and the AI never closes the lifecycle.

plan.approach_summary: Extend CANONICAL_SUBSTEPS to include analyze and clarify (empty substeps), add matching completed-status + done-phrase entries in promptBuilder.ts, and guard the substep-line rendering so buildPrompt emits a full context-update preamble for analyze and clarify — closing their lifecycles without touching .specify/ or .claude/.
risks: Empty-substep rendering line drift could break a future test grepping the exact wording — mitigated since the only existing match targets `plan`, which still has substeps.

Status regression on analyze-after-tasks: startStep flips ready-to-implement → tasking; the AI must execute the completion box to flip it back. Same failure mode that already exists for supported steps.

last_action: All 4 tasks complete, 790/790 tests pass — ready to commit
